title: chrysopsis linearifolia var. linearifolia
intro: Chrysopsis linearifolia var. linearifolia, also known as linear-leaved goldeneye, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the eastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which are found in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Chrysopsis linearifolia var. linearifolia include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from minor wounds to more serious health conditions.
